result:
Fleshed brief written to `/workspace/nexus-mk2/.scratch/patron-anima-eval/eval-a/reps/2/patron-baseline/session-viewing.md`.

The petition commits to a Spider web-UI Sessions view with: a flat reverse-chronological list (id/status/role/writ/duration/cost), a hover tooltip on cost showing token breakdown, a cancel button with confirm, a detail page reusing the quick-engine transcript component, and live streaming that also fixes the existing engine-detail page bug via a shared transport. Scope explicitly cuts filtering, search, pagination polish, analytics, and CLI. Assumptions (data model already supports sessions/cost/tokens, cancel is already a backend op, transcript component is reusable) and deferred questions (actual status enum, streaming transport choice, cancel-cascade behavior, retention) are called out for the planner to verify before dispatch.
